---
title: "watcher.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/live/watcher.ts"
loc: 47
complexity: 5
logic_score: 6.45
style_score: 3.82
intel_score: 7.96
overall_score: 4.85
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://chokidar)
- [*](file://path)
- [*](file://fs/promises)
- [runScan](file://../index.js)
- [compileMatrix](file://../intel/compiler.js)
- [SubspaceRelay](file://./socket.js)
- [*](file://chalk)
- [activePersona](file://../personaRegistry.js)

### Exports
- `startWatcher`
- `startWatcher`
- `watcher`
- `results`
- `data`
- `rebuild`
- `results`
